mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARTTABLE (CARTNO, CARTPRODUCTID, CARTDATE, CARTUSERID, CARTAMOUNT) VALUES (#{cartno},#{cartproductid},now(),#{cartuserid},#{cartamount})
mapper.select: SELECT cart.CARTNO, cart.CARTPRODUCTID, cart.CARTDATE, cart.CARTUSERID, pro.PRODUCTIMAGENAME, pro.PRODUCTIMAGEORINAME, pro.PRODUCTIMAGEURL, pro.productname, pro.productprice, pro.productsalescnt,pro.productdiscount FROM CARTTABLE cart, PRODUCTTABLE pro WHERE cart.CARTPRODUCTID = pro.PRODUCTNO ORDER BY PRODUCTNO DESC
